_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Strikingly, combined treatment of verteporfin with sorafenib or sorafenib/imatinib at reduced dosage was most effective when compared with single-agent treatment in both MPNST cell lines
details: Combined treatment of verteporfin with sorafenib or sorafenib/imatinib at reduced dosage was most effective compared with single-agent treatment
